query: Pope Leo XIV Spain June 2026 apostolic visit itinerary cities schedule
a_issues: Content A lacks the official itinerary/schedule details the question asks for. It mainly says the trip is 6-12 June 2026 and includes Madrid, Barcelona, and the Canary Islands, but does not provide the day-by-day cities or timings. It is also dominated by duplicated RVA results, reducing source diversity. One RVA snippet even calls it a six-day visit despite the stated dates 6-12 June, which is inconsistent.
b_issues: Content B includes a Wikipedia result, which is less authoritative, and an Aleteia snippet that says 'six-day' tour despite the dates 6-12 June 2026. It also mentions four destinations/cities in a secondary source, while the official Vatican result lists the itinerary only in abbreviated form in the snippet, so some details are inferential rather than fully shown in the search excerpt.
reasoning: B better enables a correct answer because it contains an official Vatican result explicitly identifying the trip as 'Apostolic Journey ... to Spain (6-12 June 2026)' and, crucially, its snippet lists the itinerary locations: 'Madrid - Barcelona - Las Palmas de Gran Canaria - Santa Cruz de Tenerife.' That directly answers the cities/itinerary part of the question. The other B results also reinforce the same route. By contrast, A provides only partial city coverage—Madrid, Barcelona, and the Canary Islands—without the specific Canary Islands cities or any real schedule details. Since the question asks for itinerary cities and schedule, B is materially closer to the needed facts and uses an official Vatican source in the result set.
